Class Toppings

java.lang.Object
Toppings
public class Toppings extends Object
Represents the entirety of the Inventory table

Holds methods to initialize local copies of the database table alonside insertion and update methods.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    List<ToppingItem>
    activeToppings
    Table including only elements where the status is 'Active'
    List<ToppingItem>
    toppings
    Table including all elements

  • Field Details

    • toppings

      public List<ToppingItem> toppings
      Table including all elements

    • activeToppings

      public List<ToppingItem> activeToppings
      Table including only elements where the status is 'Active'

  • Constructor Details

    • Toppings

      public Toppings(Connection connection)
      Initializes the object by calling the elements from the Database. Requires a connection input.
      Parameters:
      connection - Connection to the necessary database.

  • Method Details

    • getItem

      public ToppingItem getItem(int toppingId)

    • printAllItems

      public String printAllItems()
      Returns a formatted list of all element items in the database.

      Only purpose is debugging. Should have no use otherwise

      Returns:
      Formatted string showing all items in a list format

    • updateActiveItems

      public void updateActiveItems(int itemId, boolean active)
      Database Connection method, updating items through this method updates the both the database and the local table.
      Parameters:
      itemId - Item to be updated, referenced by its unique id number
      active - True for Active, False for Inactive

    • createItem

      public void createItem(Connection connection, String toppingName, double toppingPrice, String status)
      Creates a new row in the Toppings table. Updates both the database and local object
      Parameters:
      connection - Database Connection
      toppingName - Name of the new item
      toppingPrice - Price of the new item
      status - Activity status of the new

    • deleteItem

      public void deleteItem(Connection connection, int toppingId)
      Allows for deletion of an item.

      Realistically should not be used on the GUI. Deleting items risks immense loss of ordder information.

    • updateToppingName

      public void updateToppingName(Connection connection, int toppingId, String toppingName)
      Updates the name of an item in the database.
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      toppingId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      toppingName - New name of the item

    • updateToppingPrice

      public void updateToppingPrice(Connection connection, int toppingId, double toppingPrice)
      Update the price of an item in the databse
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      toppingId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      toppingPrice - New price of the item

    • updateStatus

      public void updateStatus(Connection connection, int toppingId, boolean active)
      Update the status of an item in the databse
      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection
      toppingId - Unique id of the item to be updated
      active - New activity status of the item
